transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a woman and a man.

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Could I borrow your notes from yesterday's economics lecture?

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Sure. I'll bring them to class tomorrow morning.

transcript.question_intro: What will the man probably do?

questions.prompt: What will the man probably do?

choices.text: Lend the woman his notes tomorrow.
Ask the professor for new notes.

questions.explanation: The man says he will bring his notes to class the next morning.
questions.evidence: I'll bring them to class tomorrow morning.
